mapper.select: SELECT BILLING_DETAIL_ID AS billingDetailId, BILLING_MASTER_ID AS billingMasterId, SOURCE_SERVICE_CODE AS sourceServiceCode, SOURCE_RECORD_ID AS sourceRecordId, FEE_CODE AS feeCode, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, QUANTITY AS quantity, UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, AMOUNT AS amount, DETAIL_STATUS AS detailStatus, OCCURRED_AT AS occurredAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM BILLING_DETAIL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT BILLING_DETAIL_ID AS billingDetailId, BILLING_MASTER_ID AS billingMasterId, SOURCE_SERVICE_CODE AS sourceServiceCode, SOURCE_RECORD_ID AS sourceRecordId, FEE_CODE AS feeCode, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, QUANTITY AS quantity, UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, AMOUNT AS amount, DETAIL_STATUS AS detailStatus, OCCURRED_AT AS occurredAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM BILLING_DETAIL WHERE BILLING_DETAIL_ID = #{billingDetailId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BILLING_DETAIL ( BILLING_DETAIL_ID, BILLING_MASTER_ID, SOURCE_SERVICE_CODE, SOURCE_RECORD_ID, FEE_CODE, ITEM_NAME, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, AMOUNT, DETAIL_STATUS, OCCURRED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{billingDetailId}, #{billingMasterId}, #{sourceServiceCode}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{feeCode}, #{itemName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{detailStatus}, #{occurredAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT BILLING_DETAIL_ID AS billingDetailId, DETAIL_STATUS AS detailStatus FROM BILLING_DETAIL WHERE BILLING_DETAIL_ID = #{billingDetailId}
SELECT BILLING_DETAIL_ID AS billingDetailId, DETAIL_STATUS AS detailStatus FROM BILLING_DETAIL WHERE BILLING_DETAIL_ID = #{billingId}
mapper.update: UPDATE billing SET billing_status = 'SUCCESS', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE billing_id = #{billingId} AND billing_status = 'READY'
